creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
This port provides an American English, female voice for Festival. It
depends on the festival (ports/21182) and festlex-ogi (ports/21187) ports.  
It uses the OGI extensions, so the festival port must be prepared with
WITH_OGI (I don't know how to do this in RUN_DEPENDS). This is based on
the NetBSD port.  Please retain the line saying so, and the $NetBSD$ RCS
tags, when committing it.

Fix: 

http://jpj.net/~trevor/freebsd/ports/festvox-tll.shar
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
